dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Let's continue your job search preparation. The AI agent is here to help.
dashboard.calendarSyncDesc: Automatically detect interview and briefing emails and add them to your calendar
dashboard.calendarAutoWriteDesc: Off by default. When off, CareerPass asks you on Telegram before adding any detected interview/briefing event to your calendar. Saying yes turns this switch on automatically.
dashboard.recentEventsDesc: Click 'Copy Note' to easily copy optimized event details for sharing
dashboard.noRecentEvents: No auto-synced events yet. When new emails trigger a sync, events will appear here.
dashboard.chatBotBindDesc: Currently supporting Telegram. LINE / WhatsApp / WeChat support is coming soon.
dashboard.telegramDesc: Current main channel. Supports QR code binding and message notifications.
dashboard.lineDesc: Upcoming support for notifications and conversations via LINE.
dashboard.whatsappDesc: Upcoming support for notifications and conversations via WhatsApp.
dashboard.wechatDesc: Upcoming support for notifications and conversations via WeChat.
dashboard.telegramInstructions: First, bind your CareerPass exclusive advisor via Telegram. Once Telegram integration is complete, other platforms will be available here when released.
dashboard.step1: Scan the QR code or click the button
dashboard.step3: The AI coach will greet you automatically
dashboard.jobListDesc: Keep track of your application progress. Click on a company to view status history.
dashboard.noJobs: No application records yet. Once you bind your email, new application emails will be automatically organized here.
dashboard.portalAccountHintPlaceholder: e.g. registered email / My Page ID
dashboard.notificationPrefsDesc: Set when and what types of notifications your personal assistant should send via Telegram.

nudgeCategory.status_suggestion_desc: Notifies you to confirm when an email might contain a new application status.
nudgeCategory.time_nudge_desc: Gently reminds you when an action is due soon.
nudgeCategory.inactivity_desc: Keeps an eye out when a company hasn't progressed for a long time.
nudgeCategory.deadline_warning_desc: Reminds you before ES, briefing, or interview deadlines.
nudgeCategory.follow_up_desc: Prompts you to follow up after interviews or key communications.

dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.changePasswordDesc: Please enter your current password and a new password (at least 8 characters).
dashboard.deleteAccountDesc: This action cannot be undone. It will delete your account and associated data. Please enter your password to confirm.
dashboard.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
